text:
Once upon a drearily snowy evening, a lonely snowbird named Snowdrop decided she'd had enough of solitude. She wanted to go someplace warm.

So Snowdrop woke her tiny feathersleepy friend, a little owl named Sunshine. Sunny was awake!

"Hoot! Where dost you wish to fly?" Sunny cooed.

"To a bright place—I've got a story to tell!"

Sunshine grinned. "Just once a year. What story could it be?"

"Just one I haven't told yet."

At daybreak, Snowdrop fluttered northward. There she found herself in a bright orange town. This wasn’t just any place at all—it was Valentine Town!

Every fox seemed dressed in red feathers and hearts fluttered everywhere. Snowdrop was enchanted:

"Hellooooooo!"

An otter piped up, her cheeks decorated with pink pompons. "That sounds lovely... perhaps we could become great friends?"

"A pair of hearts!"

Together they roamed the streets. Owl
